Module 1: Launch Goals
!
Executive Summary
“A good plan violently executed now is better than a perfect plan executed
next week.”
- General George S. Patton
Here’s a key thing you need to understand: it’s very important to be clear
on what you want your destination to be and look like. You can’t create a
great strategy until you figure out where you want to go.
The first question that I ask my Private Clients:
What do you want to get out of your launch? What is a home run for you
You can have both primary and secondary goals for your launch. Your
goals will impact your overall launch strategy.
!
Two big categories of goals
• 	1. Money
• 	This is what most people assume a launch is about, but it’s not
always the case
!
1	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.

-- 1 of 3 --

• 	If it is about money (and I’ve done many launches that WERE about
the money)... then own it
• 	2. “Save the World”
• 	There are lots of PLF Launches in this category
• 	Saving the world doesn’t mean you can’t make money
• 	It’s a lot easier to save the world if you can FUND your mission
!
Launch Goals
• 	Build proof and social proof
• 	When creating PLF initially a main goal was to gain success stories
and prove to myself and others that I can do this
• 	Attract Joint Venture partners and affiliates - build a conversion machine
• 	Generally your potential partners/affiliates will be some of the first
people on your list
• 	Once you have metrics/data from your own internal launches, it
becomes easier to approach JV’s to promote you
• 	To create products - this can be done with a seed launch if you don’t
already have one
• 	Sell a live event or teleseminar
!
2	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.

-- 2 of 3 --

• 	Build your list - this can be a client list, prospect list, or both
• 	Gather data - through a launch you can get lots of data for your squeeze
pages and headlines
• 	If you’re looking to influence people, PLF is the best way to do it.
• 	Examples: FuzzyYellowBalls.com - A tennis coaching site run by Will
Hamilton. Ran a launch with prominent pro tennis players so he could
attract other pro’s
!
3	© 2014 Internet Alchemy, Inc.

-- 3 of 3 --
